resume_text: Built machine learning models using Python and scikit-learn. Performed data cleaning, exploratory data analysis, and SQL queries for analytics projects.
Developed predictive models and worked with pandas, NumPy, and SQL databases. Strong interest in AI and data-driven problem solving.
Created dashboards and performed statistical analysis using Python. Built regression models and handled large datasets.
Built responsive websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Worked on React projects and improved UI/UX for web applications.
Developed frontend components using React and Bootstrap. Integrated REST APIs and improved website performance.
Designed interactive web pages with modern CSS and JavaScript frameworks. Passionate about web design and user experience.
Developed REST APIs using Python and Flask. Managed relational databases and implemented authentication systems.
Worked on backend systems with Python. Designed database schemas and handled API integrations.
Built server-side applications using Flask and managed SQL databases. Implemented CRUD operations and authentication modules.
Experienced in Python programming, machine learning, and backend API development. Worked with Flask and built predictive analytics tools.
Developed full-stack applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Python Flask. Strong backend and frontend knowledge.
Implemented data analysis pipelines and built dashboards using Python. Comfortable with SQL and statistical modeling.
